creator: m-kasahr@sra.co.jp
text:
I have port GNU libtool-1.2 to FreeBSD-2.2.x.
GNU libtool is a generic library support script.

In the pkg/PLIST file, the directory `share/aclocal' is deleted by the
following way:

	"@unexec rmdir %D/share/aclocal 2>/dev/null || true"

because also GNU automake puts some files at the directory.


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	libtool-1.2
#	libtool-1.2/Makefile
#	libtool-1.2/files
#	libtool-1.2/files/md5
#	libtool-1.2/pkg
#	libtool-1.2/pkg/PLIST
#	libtool-1.2/pkg/DESCR
#	libtool-1.2/pkg/COMMENT
#	libtool-1.2/patches
#	libtool-1.2/patches/patch-aa
#	libtool-1.2/patches/patch-ab
#
echo c - libtool-1.2
mkdir -p libtool-1.2 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - libtool-1.2/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >libtool-1.2/Makefile << 'END-of-libtool-1.2/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	libtool
X# Version required:	1.2
X# Date created:		6 May 1998
X# Whom:			Motoyuki Kasahara <m-kasahr@sra.co.jp>
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	libtool-1.2
XCATEGORIES=	devel
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
X
XMAINTAINER=	m-kasahr@sra.co.jp
X
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ENV=	INSTALL_SCRIPT="${INSTALL_SCRIPT}" \
X		INSTALL_DATA="${INSTALL_DATA}"
X
Xpre-install:
X	@if [ ! -f ${PREFIX}/info/dir ]; then \
X	  ${SED} -ne '1,/Menu:/p' /usr/share/info/dir > ${PREFIX}/info/dir; \
X	 fi
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-libtool-1.2/Makefile
echo c - libtool-1.2/files
mkdir -p libtool-1.2/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - libtool-1.2/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >libtool-1.2/files/md5 << 'END-of-libtool-1.2/files/md5'
XMD5 (libtool-1.2.tar.gz) = 66b016fdf220682affbfdcaa2225a9bd
END-of-libtool-1.2/files/md5
echo c - libtool-1.2/pkg
mkdir -p libtool-1.2/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - libtool-1.2/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >libtool-1.2/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-libtool-1.2/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/libtool
Xbin/libtoolize
X@unexec install-info --delete %D/info/libtool.info %D/info/dir
Xinfo/libtool.info
X@exec [ -f %D/info/dir ] || sed -ne '1,/Menu:/p' /usr/share/info/dir > %D/info/dir
X@exec install-info %D/info/libtool.info %D/info/dir
Xshare/aclocal/libtool.m4
Xshare/libtool/config.guess
Xshare/libtool/config.sub
Xshare/libtool/ltconfig
Xshare/libtool/ltmain.sh
X@dirrm share/libtool
X@unexec rmdir %D/share/aclocal 2>/dev/null || true
END-of-libtool-1.2/pkg/PLIST
echo x - libtool-1.2/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >libtool-1.2/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-libtool-1.2/pkg/DESCR'
XThis is GNU Libtool, a generic library support script.  Libtool hides
Xthe complexity of using shared libraries behind a consistent, portable
Xinterface.
X
XTo use libtool, add the new generic library building commands to your
XMakefile, Makefile.in, or Makefile.am.
END-of-libtool-1.2/pkg/DESCR
echo x - libtool-1.2/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >libtool-1.2/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-libtool-1.2/pkg/COMMENT'
XGeneric shared library support script.
END-of-libtool-1.2/pkg/COMMENT
echo c - libtool-1.2/patches
mkdir -p libtool-1.2/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - libtool-1.2/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >libtool-1.2/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-libtool-1.2/patches/patch-aa'
X--- doc/libtool.texi.orig	Wed Mar 11 02:04:36 1998
X+++ doc/libtool.texi	Mon Apr 27 16:57:24 1998
X@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@
X @set BUGADDR the libtool mailing list @email{<bug-libtool@@gnu.org>}
X @set objdir .libs
X 
X-@dircategory GNU programming tools
X+@dircategory Programming & development tools
X @direntry
X * Libtool: (libtool).           Generic shared library support script.
X @end direntry
END-of-libtool-1.2/patches/patch-aa
echo x - libtool-1.2/patches/patch-ab
sed 's/^X//' >libtool-1.2/patches/patch-ab << 'END-of-libtool-1.2/patches/patch-ab'
X--- doc/Makefile.in.orig	Fri Mar 20 17:01:52 1998
X+++ doc/Makefile.in	Mon Apr 27 17:22:55 1998
X@@ -56,7 +56,7 @@
X LD = @LD@
X LIBTOOL = @LIBTOOL@
X LN_S = @LN_S@
X-MAKEINFO = @MAKEINFO@
X+MAKEINFO = @MAKEINFO@ --no-split
X NM = @NM@
X PACKAGE = @PACKAGE@
X RANLIB = @RANLIB@
END-of-libtool-1.2/patches/patch-ab
exit
